intro: I don't see leadership as a title — I see it as a system to be designed. The next decade runs along three horizons.
thesis_lead: AI adoption isn't a technology transformation. It's a workflow, decision-making, governance, and operating-model transformation — the same class of problem I've been solving for years.
thesis_rest: The hard part was never the tooling. It's organizational adoption.

horizons.title: Lead the next transformation
horizons.description: Stand up AI-enabled ways of working across an engineering organization and evolve its operating model around them — AI as an organizational capability, not a technology initiative.

horizons.title: Modernize at scale
horizons.description: Help scaling and enterprise organizations turn strategy into execution through periods of transition: delivery modernization, flow optimization, operating-model design.

horizons.title: Build something of my own
horizons.description: Found or build a company, applying end-to-end what I've learned across engineering, delivery, transformation, AI, and systems design.
